title: Pi Agent Settings
description: Complete configuration schema for the pi coding agent's settings.json file. Supports global (~/.pi/agent/settings.json) and project (.pi/settings.json) scopes with deep-merge semantics.

lastChangelogVersion.description: Last version of the changelog shown to the user. Suppresses repeated changelog notifications until the agent is updated. Set automatically by pi.

defaultProvider.description: Default LLM provider name (e.g. 'anthropic', 'openai', 'deepseek'). Must correspond to a provider configured in the agent's provider config or in models.json.

defaultModel.description: Default model ID used with the default provider (e.g. 'claude-sonnet-4-20250514', 'gpt-4o', 'deepseek-v4-flash').

defaultThinkingLevel.description: Default thinking/effort level for reasoning-capable models. Controls how much reasoning effort the model expends on responses.

hideThinkingBlock.description: Hide thinking/reasoning blocks in the TUI output. The model still reasons internally; only the visible block is suppressed.

thinkingBudgets.description: Custom token budgets per thinking level. Overrides the built-in budget sizes.

theme.description: UI theme name. Built-in options: 'dark', 'light'. Custom themes can be loaded via the 'themes' setting.

quietStartup.description: Hide the startup header (logo, version, tips) on interactive launch.

defaultProjectTrust.description: Fallback behavior when pi encounters an untrusted project with local settings/skills in non-interactive mode. Global setting only. 'ask' prompts in interactive mode; 'always' trusts silently; 'never' ignores project-local config.

collapseChangelog.description: Show a condensed (collapsed) changelog after agent updates instead of the full version.

enableInstallTelemetry.description: Send an anonymous install/update version ping to pi.dev after install or changelog-detected updates. Does not control update checks.

enableAnalytics.description: Opt-in analytics data sharing. Currently only offered during experimental first-time setup (PI_EXPERIMENTAL=1).

trackingId.description: Analytics tracking identifier. Auto-generated when enableAnalytics is turned on.

doubleEscapeAction.description: Action triggered by pressing Escape twice quickly in the TUI.

treeFilterMode.description: Default conversation tree filter mode applied by /tree.

editorPaddingX.description: Horizontal padding (in characters) applied inside the TUI input editor pane (0-3).

autocompleteMaxVisible.description: Maximum number of visible items in the autocomplete dropdown (3-20).

showHardwareCursor.description: Show the terminal's hardware cursor while the TUI positions it for IME (input method) support.

httpProxy.description: HTTP proxy URL. Applied as both HTTP_PROXY and HTTPS_PROXY environment variables for pi's network requests. Global setting only.

warnings.description: Toggle specific warning messages in the TUI.

anthropicExtraUsage.description: Show a warning when Anthropic subscription auth may incur paid extra usage charges.

compaction.description: Settings for automatic context compaction. When the conversation exceeds available token space, pi summarizes older messages to free up room.

reserveTokens.description: Tokens reserved for the LLM response after compaction.

keepRecentTokens.description: Number of most recent tokens to keep uncompressed (not summarized) during compaction.

branchSummary.description: Settings for conversation branch summarization. Controls how pi summarizes branches when navigating the conversation tree.

reserveTokens.description: Tokens reserved for the LLM when generating a branch summary.

skipPrompt.description: Skip the 'Summarize branch?' prompt on /tree navigation. When true, no summary is generated for navigated branches.

retry.description: Agent-level and provider-level retry settings for transient errors (rate limits, network blips, server errors).

enabled.description: Enable automatic agent-level retry on transient errors.

maxRetries.description: Maximum agent-level retry attempts before giving up.

baseDelayMs.description: Base delay for exponential backoff (doubles each retry: 2s, 4s, 8s...).

provider.description: Settings for the underlying provider/SDK retry mechanism.

timeoutMs.description: Provider/SDK request timeout in milliseconds. Default is SDK-specific.

maxRetries.description: Provider/SDK-level retry attempts. Keep at 0 unless provider-level retries are explicitly needed, as SDK retries may handle rate limits before pi's agent-level retry sees them.

maxRetryDelayMs.description: Maximum server-requested retry delay in milliseconds before failing immediately with an informative error. Set to 0 to disable the cap.

steeringMode.description: How steering (system-level) messages are delivered to the model. 'all' sends all at once; 'one-at-a-time' sends them incrementally.

followUpMode.description: How follow-up messages are delivered to the model. 'all' sends all at once; 'one-at-a-time' sends them incrementally.

transport.description: Preferred transport protocol for providers that support multiple transports. 'auto' lets the provider decide.

httpIdleTimeoutMs.description: HTTP header/body idle timeout in milliseconds. Also used by providers with explicit stream idle timeouts. Set to 0 to disable.

websocketConnectTimeoutMs.description: WebSocket connect/open handshake timeout in milliseconds for providers that support WebSocket transports. Set to 0 to disable.

terminal.description: Settings for terminal rendering and image display.

showImages.description: Show inline images in the terminal (Kitty, iTerm2, Sixel protocols).

imageWidthCells.description: Preferred inline image width in terminal cell columns.

clearOnShrink.description: Clear empty rows when terminal content shrinks. May cause flicker on some terminals.

images.description: Settings for image processing before sending to the LLM.

autoResize.description: Automatically resize images to a maximum of 2000x2000 pixels before sending to the LLM.

blockImages.description: Block all images from being sent to the LLM. The model will never see image attachments.

shellPath.description: Custom shell executable path for executing bash commands (e.g., for Cygwin on Windows, or a specific shell binary).

shellCommandPrefix.description: Prefix prepended to every bash command before execution. Useful for shell setup like alias expansion.

npmCommand.description: Command argv for all npm package-manager operations (install, uninstall, dependency installs). Use argv-style entries exactly as the process should be launched. Useful for pinning Node version via wrapper tools like mise or asdf.

sessionDir.description: Directory where session files are stored. Accepts absolute paths, relative paths, and ~ expansion. Precedence: --session-dir > PI_CODING_AGENT_SESSION_DIR > sessionDir.

enabledModels.description: Glob patterns for model IDs to enable for Ctrl+P cycling /model command. Same format as the --models CLI flag. Supports wildcards.

markdown.description: Settings for markdown rendering in the TUI.

codeBlockIndent.description: Indentation string used for code blocks inside markdown output.

packages.description: Pi packages (npm or git) to load resources from. Each item can be a package source string (loads all resources) or an object filtering which resources to load.

oneOf.description: Package source string. npm format: 'npm:@scope/pkg@version', git format: 'git:github.com/user/repo@ref' or full URL.
Package with resource filtering: specify exactly which extensions, skills, prompts, and themes to load from the package.

skills.description: Skill names to load from this package.

extensions.description: Extension names to load from this package.

prompts.description: Prompt template names to load from this package.

themes.description: Theme names to load from this package.

extensions.description: Local extension file paths or directories. Supports glob patterns, plus/minus prefix for force-include/exclude. Paths in global settings resolve relative to ~/.pi/agent; paths in project settings resolve relative to .pi/.

skills.description: Local skill file paths or directories. Supports glob patterns and exclusion (! prefix). Paths in global settings resolve relative to ~/.pi/agent; paths in project settings resolve relative to .pi/.

prompts.description: Local prompt template file paths or directories. Supports glob patterns. Paths in global settings resolve relative to ~/.pi/agent; paths in project settings resolve relative to .pi/.

themes.description: Local theme file paths or directories. Supports glob patterns. Paths in global settings resolve relative to ~/.pi/agent; paths in project settings resolve relative to .pi/.

enableSkillCommands.description: Register loaded skills as /skill:name slash commands for easy access in the TUI.
